global.description: The ad features a green background with various graphic elements and text promoting a financial tracking service.
global.main_message: Promoting a financial tracking service with a clear call to action.

elements.label: green background
elements.description: A solid green background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: main graphic element
elements.description: An abstract shape that includes an oval and a rectangle, outlined but not filled.

elements.label: main graphic element
elements.description: A larger rectangle shape, outlined, positioned centrally within the ad.

elements.label: main graphic element

elements.label: smaller graphic element

elements.label: smaller graphic element

elements.label: main message

elements.label: call to action
elements.description: A button with the text 'Get offer' in a prominent position at the bottom.

elements.label: ClearLedger logo
elements.description: A small logo text 'ClearLedger' positioned at the top left.

elements.label: SALE badge
elements.description: A small badge with the text 'SALE' in a bright color, positioned at the top right.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small label with the text 'UGC' positioned at the top left, above the logo.
